name: Makakini Bananini
lore:
Lore of Makakini Bananini
                                    


A character with Macak in bananas .
Description original text
Makakini Bananini, Wah! Wah! Wah!
Makakini Banani! and! and!
Bananuci, monkey, monkey, monkey, uchi.
Bananuchi, Monkey, Monkey, Monkey, Uki.
Makakini Bananini, Wow! and! and!
Bananuchi, monkey, monkey, monkey, Uchi.
